title: Beauty Salon POS Software System Canada | Zolmi Point of Sale

headers.text: POS Software Features Tailored for Beauty Salons
Elevate Your Beauty Salon with Zolmi POS Software
Transform Your Beauty Salon's Checkout Experience!
Streamline every transaction with tools designed for your unique services
Experience seamless operations and enhanced client satisfaction
Choose the perfect plan for your business needs

paragraphs: Zolmi's Point of Sale solution is perfectly crafted for beauty salons in Canada. Manage diverse treatments, retail products, and client payments effortlessly.
Handle payments for diverse beauty treatments, packages, and retail products smoothly. Supports various payment methods.
Easily sell skincare, makeup, and other beauty retail items. Manage product variants (e.g., shades, sizes) and track sales.
Manage a wide range of beauty services, create bundled packages, and track their redemption with ease.
Access detailed client history including past services, product purchases, and preferences for personalized upselling.
Automate commission calculations for beauticians and therapists based on services performed and products sold.
Issue and redeem gift cards and vouchers directly through the POS, boosting sales and client loyalty.
Provide a quick, professional, and error-free checkout process, making every client visit seamless from start to finish.
Leverage client history and integrated inventory to suggest relevant retail products and service add-ons at checkout.
For growing salons ready to scale
Most popular choice for established salons
For growing salons ready to scale
Most popular choice for established salons
Discover how Zolmi's dedicated Point of Sale system for beauty salons can simplify your daily tasks, impress clients, and drive growth.
